'''''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 8''' is the eighth issue of ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]''. It was published by [[Topps]] in [[August]] [[1996]]. This issue's theme focused on the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]].

The Deluxe Collectors' Edition of issue 8, exclusive to subscribers and comic stores, came polybagged with two promotional trading cards, one for the Topps [[1996 Topps Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' card set]] and another highlighting issue 8's cover art by [[Cam Kennedy]]. This issue also included the fold-out poster article ''[[The Deadly Dozen]]''.

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}
